name: Math Quest Adventure
description: Interactive math learning game with adaptive difficulty, visual manipulatives, and gamified progression for K-8 students

tools.name: start_math_quest
tools.description: Start a new math quest session with the specified topic and difficulty level.

tools.name: get_quest_progress
tools.description: Get the student's current progress including score, streak, and level.

tools.name: get_hint
tools.description: Get a hint for the current math problem.
